title: scrophularia grayana var. borealikoreana
intro: Scrophularia grayana var. borealikoreana, also known as Korean scorpion grass, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) native to Korea and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia grayana var. borealikoreana include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer effects. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to utilize its medicinal properties.
